summary: Iteration 57: Slot Rotation / Inventory Cleanup feature tests completed. All 19 backend API tests pass (3 skipped due to no active weather positions with resolution data). Frontend UI verified: Slot Rotations card (0 - expected for legacy positions), Rank column showing #rank/total with color coding, slot_rotation exit reason in distribution, 'Slot rotate: bottom 30%' in Entry Quality footer. Currently 54 legacy positions evaluated with book_rank/book_score/book_total, 2 profit_capture exit candidates flagged. Slot rotation count is 0 because legacy positions lack hours_to_resolution - correct behavior per design.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 57 verified Slot Rotation / Inventory Cleanup feature. Key findings: (1) All 54 positions have book_rank, book_score, book_total in lifecycle evaluations. (2) book_rank=1 is strongest (highest book_score), rank increases as score decreases. (3) Slot rotation count is 0 because all 54 legacy positions have hours_to_resolution=null - they don't meet the >24h criterion. This is correct behavior. (4) Slot rotation will activate for new positions with resolution time data. (5) Criteria: bottom 30% of book AND >24h to resolution AND <200bp edge AND <1.2x profit. (6) Asymmetric positions excluded from ranking. (7) Frontend shows Rank column with #rank/total format, Slot Rotations card (0), Exit Reason Distribution includes Slot Rotation, Entry Quality shows 'Slot rotate: bottom 30%'. (8) Currently 2 exit candidates (profit_capture) - Chicago positions with 2.45x and 8.32x profit multiples. (9) All previous lifecycle features still work.
